hero.headline: Create digital products
hero.subheadline: BookForge AI transforms your ideas into polished eBooks, guides, workbooks, and marketing content — structured, editable, and ready to sell.
hero.socialProof: No credit card required · 3 free documents per month

features.headline: Everything you need to create and sell
features.subheadline: BookForge AI is built for creators who want to move fast without sacrificing quality.

aiGeneration.title: AI-Powered Generation
aiGeneration.description: Describe your topic and let AI create structured, professional content instantly.

editable.title: Fully Editable
editable.description: Every generated section is editable. Refine tone, add details, restructure freely.

multipleFormats.title: Multiple Formats
multipleFormats.description: eBooks, workbooks, checklists, lead magnets, sales pages — one platform.

exportAnywhere.title: Export Anywhere
exportAnywhere.description: Export as PDF, HTML, or structured data. Ready for Gumroad, Shopify, or your own store.

blazingFast.title: Blazing Fast
blazingFast.description: Generate a complete 30-page guide in under 2 minutes. No waiting, no friction.

secure.title: Your Content, Secured
secure.description: All documents are private by default. Row-level security ensures only you see your work.

productTypes.headline: One platform. Every digital product.
productTypes.subheadline: From lead magnets to full eBooks — create any digital product your audience needs.

cta.headline: Ready to build your first digital product?
cta.subheadline: Join creators worldwide using BookForge AI to launch digital products faster than ever before.
cta.footnote: Free plan · No credit card · Cancel anytime

footer.description: The AI platform for creating professional digital products.
